apps.name: Nuvio Enhanced
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.2.16

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.16**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.16).

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Now Playing Control in the Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added Live TV playlists management.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Add artwork type for Hero background.
* Add Trakt alternative auth method to support LiveContainer user.
* Relocated Trakt configuration into the Integrations Settings menu.
* Added in-app debug logs (go to Settings -> Advanced -> Debug Logs).
* Changed the "Play" button to "Watch Again" for already-watched movies to improve tracking clarity by @AdityasahuX07.
* Added Library Calendar by @yesnt10.
* Added playback info by @anilabhadatta.
* Added "Content Warning" toggle in Settings by @siriusvoid.

**Bug Fixes:**
* Fixed animated GIF support for Profile Avatars.
* Fixed animated GIF support for Stream Badge.
* Fixed iPad rotation by @anilabhadatta.

**What's New:**
- Fixed Skip Intro
- Redesigned Now Playing artwork
- Player Control: added quality info and selection for all playback
- Live TV: added playlist management
- Live TV: added enable/disable playlist toggle
- Live TV: removed irrelevant subtitles and sources selection from Live TV player control
- Live TV: added channels selection filter in the Live TV player control
- Live TV: added "back to top" button in the channels listing
- Trakt: added alternate authentication method to support LiveContainer
- Hero: added hero artwork selection to use poster or backdrop
- Hero: adjusted Hero Section height for mobile portrait and tablet landscape
- Hero: refresh Hero background on artwork type change


> **💡 Note for iOS Users:**
Since Nuvio embeds heavy media frameworks, sideloading tools like AltStore, SideStore, or Sideloadly have to manually re-sign thousands of internal components with your Apple ID certificate. If the installation progress bar looks stuck, please don't close it! Just give it a few minutes to process the signing in the background, and it will install successfully. Use cable connection to speed-up sideloading process.

> **💡 Note for Android Users:** Unsigned debug APKs are included in the assets below if you want to test the Enhanced features on Android. You may not able to install this apk because it's unsigned.

---

## 📥 Downloads

| Variant | Platform | Architecture | File |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Nuvio Full** | iOS | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.16-Full.ipa](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.16/Nuvio-v0.2.16-Full.ipa) |
| **Nuvio Enhanced** | iOS | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.16-Enhanced.ipa](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.16/Nuvio-v0.2.16-Enhanced.ipa) |
| **Nuvio Enhanced** | Android | Universal | [Nuvio-v0.2.16-Enhanced.apk](https://github.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/releases/download/0.2.16/Nuvio-v0.2.16-Enhanced.apk) |
apps.localizedDescription: Nuvio Enhanced includes exclusive experimental features, volume boosting, and performance fixes not available in the upstream build.
